---
title: "JapanTechRadar — Japan Technology Intelligence"
description: "What Japanese patents reveal about your competitors and partners. Quantitative analysis, contextualised, delivered in English."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

::: hero-banner
# What Japanese Patents Reveal About Your Competitors

## Public Japanese data, invisible behind the language barrier — made readable and actionable.

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::

## The Problem

Japanese companies file tens of thousands of patents every year. These filings are public, freely accessible on J-PlatPat — and completely invisible to European companies that don't read technical Japanese.

The result: you're navigating without a map in a sector where Japanese players are innovating, repositioning, and eroding your competitive advantages — without you knowing it.

---

## The Solution: JapanTechRadar

JapanTechRadar turns this raw data into strategic intelligence. In 3 to 4 weeks, I analyse the patent filings of Japanese players in your sector and deliver a clear report, in English, with actionable recommendations.

This is not a generalist intelligence report. It's a targeted analysis focused on your sector, your competitors, your questions.

---

## What You Receive

A report of 10 to 20 pages covering:

- **Actor mapping** — Who are the leaders and emerging players in your sector in Japan, measured by their patent filings
- **Technology trends** — Which technologies are rising, which are declining, where the potential disruptions lie
- **Comparative analysis** — How your Japanese competitors position themselves relative to each other — and relative to you
- **Weak signals** — New entrants, strategy changes, unusual collaborations detected in the filings
- **Recommendations** — What these data concretely mean for your decisions (partnership, investment, positioning, R&D)

---

## A Concrete Example

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Representative fictitious case:**

A French automotive supplier wants to understand the technological lead of its Japanese competitors in solid-state batteries. The analysis covers 36 companies and their patent filings over 5 years. It reveals the real leaders (different from the media-visible ones), the emerging technologies to watch, and two partnership opportunity windows before a probable sector consolidation.

All delivered in English. Contextualised. Actionable.
:::

---

## Methodology

Each report combines:

- Quantitative extraction and analysis of Japanese patent databases (J-PlatPat, Espacenet)
- R-corrected patent counts for a fair comparison between actors of different sizes
- Contextual interpretation by a trilingual analyst based in Japan for nearly 10 years

---

## Sectors Covered

Automotive and mobility · Aerospace and defence · Energy · Advanced materials · Cybersecurity · Other sectors on request

---

## Pricing and Timeline

| Format | Scope | Timeline |
|---|---|---|
| Sector report | Full analysis of a sector, 20–50 actors | 3-4 weeks |
| Pilot report | First report at discovery pricing | 2 weeks |
| Quarterly subscription | Updated report + alerts | — |

Fees exclusive of tax. A precise quote is provided after the discovery call, with no commitment required.

---

::: contact-section
### Who is innovating in your sector in Japan?

A 30-minute call to define the scope of your analysis and see what JapanTechRadar can bring you.

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::
